findings.title: Potential God modules
findings.evidence: axum-core/src/response/into_response.rs, axum/src/response/sse.rs, axum/src/response/mod.rs, axum/src/lib.rs, axum/src/extract/connect_info.rs, axum/src/extract/matched_path.rs, axum/src/extract/path/de.rs, axum/src/extract/path/mod.rs, axum/src/extract/ws.rs, axum/src/routing/strip_prefix.rs, axum/src/routing/tests/nest.rs, axum/src/routing/tests/mod.rs, axum/src/routing/mod.rs, axum/src/routing/method_routing.rs, axum/src/serve/mod.rs, axum-extra/src/response/file_stream.rs, axum-extra/src/extract/multipart.rs, axum-extra/src/routing/mod.rs, axum-macros/src/debug_handler.rs, axum-macros/src/lib.rs, axum-macros/src/from_request/mod.rs
findings.recommendation: Extract cohesive submodules and isolate orchestration from domain behavior.

findings.title: Excessive dependency concentration

findings.title: Circular dependency risk
findings.evidence: axum/src/lib.rs centralizes 25 module declarations; axum-extra/src/lib.rs centralizes 22 module declarations
findings.recommendation: Review module directionality and enforce dependency rules at crate boundaries.
